macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Coinbase Announces Massive Expansion to Become All-in-One Financial Platform with AI
items.summary: Coinbase revealed yesterday it is launching 11 new businesses simultaneously, pushing to become an all-in-exchange offering stocks, perpetuals, and AI automation to act as a bank, broker, and financial advisor.

items.title: Illinois Becomes First U.S. State to Tax Crypto Transactions, Even Wallet-to-Wallet
items.summary: Illinois Governor Pritzker signed a law imposing a 0.2% tax on all crypto transactions, including transfers between a user's own wallets, creating what critics call a punitive digital asset tax regime.

items.title: Bitcoin Holds Critical $64,000 Support as Altcoins Outperform with Zcash Surge
items.summary: Bitcoin maintained key support at $64,000 while altcoins showed strength ahead of BTC, with Zcash experiencing a significant price surge and Bitcoin dominance declining.

items.title: Standard Chartered Sets $100 Target for Uniswap Token, a 40X Increase from Call Price
items.summary: Standard Chartered analysts issued a bullish forecast for Uniswap (UNI), setting a $100 price target that represents a 40X return from their initial $2.50 call.

items.title: Michael Saylor Claims MicroStrategy is the Market's Biggest Shock Absorber in Bear Market
items.summary: At BTC Prague 2026, Michael Saylor stated MicroStrategy has net bought 250,000 Bitcoin this year, acting as the market's largest buyer and shock absorber to prevent a crash from $120,000 to $30,000.

items.title: Ricardo Salinas's Coin Pro Partners with Anchorash Digital for Stablecoin Remittances
items.summary: Billionaire Ricardo Salinas revealed his company Coin Pro is partnering with Anchorash Digital to enter the remittances business using stablecoins.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Epic Games Details Unreal Engine 6 with Generative AI Integration
items.summary: Epic Games announced that Unreal Engine 6 will prominently integrate generative AI models to help developers build content faster while reducing tedious work and maintaining creative control.

items.title: Ninja Theory Announced Despite Planned Studio Closure
items.summary: Microsoft revealed Ninja Theory's new game even as reports confirm the studio is set to shut down, joining Double Fine and Compulsion Games in a wave of Xbox studio closures.

items.title: Cosmic Horror Shooter Studio Shuts Down Less Than 30 Days After Launch
items.summary: The studio behind Luna Abyss, a cosmic horror shooter on Game Pass, is closing its doors less than a month after release despite glowing reviews and positive Steam ratings.

items.title: Rockstar Offers Free GTA 5 Upgrades for Last-Gen Owners
items.summary: Rockstar Games announced it will provide free upgrades to GTA 5 for owners of older console versions and PC, expanding access to the latest version.

items.title: Nioh 3 Revealed with Demo Available Now
items.summary: Team Ninja and Koei Tecmo announced Nioh 3 during Sony's State of Play, with the game coming in 2026 and a demo already playable on PS5.

items.title: Final Fantasy Tactics: The Ivalice Chronicles Remaster Coming September
items.summary: Square Enix revealed Final Fantasy Tactics - The Ivalice Chronicles will launch in September 2026, featuring a Collector's Box that excludes the game itself.

items.title: Bloodstained: The Scarlet Engagement Announced for 2027
items.summary: Developer ArtPlay revealed the latest entry in the Bloodstained series, The Scarlet Engagement, during the June PlayStation State of Play, with a release expected next year.

items.title: Silent Hill f Release Date Revealed Earlier Than Expected
items.summary: Silent Hill f is coming sooner than anticipated, with a confirmed release date announced during recent gaming showcases.

items.title: Mortal Kombat Legacy Kollection Coming Later This Year
items.summary: Players will soon be able to play the original four Mortal Kombat games on PS4 and PS5 via the upcoming Mortal Kombat Legacy Kollection.

items.title: Dave the Diver Launches on iOS and Android in August
items.summary: The underwater roguelite and restaurant management game Dave the Diver will be available on mobile platforms starting this August.
